channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINE → RUSSIA : Violate ceasefire (Zelenskiy, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: UKRAINE / RUSSIA. Location: Zelenskiy, Astrakhanskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] SETTLER → SETTLEMENT : Demonstrate or rally (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: SETTLER / SETTLEMENT. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 12 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] UNITED STATES → ISRAEL : Demonstrate or rally (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: UNITED STATES / ISRAEL. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] POLITBURO → RUSSIA : Engage in popular protest, not specified below (Moscow, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in popular protest, not specified below. Actors: POLITBURO / RUSSIA. Location: Moscow, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → HEALTH MINIST : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Bedias, Liban-Sud, Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / HEALTH MINIST. Location: Bedias, Liban-Sud, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: LEBANON / ISRAEL. Location: Beirut, Beyrouth, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] nan → CANADA : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: nan / CANADA. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] ARSONIST → IRANIAN : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Golders Green, Barnet, United Kingdom)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: ARSONIST / IRANIAN. Location: Golders Green, Barnet, United Kingdom. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.
